obra: Fools of Time: Studies in Shakespearean Tragedy
modelo_dominante: Frye's system APPLIED to Shakespearean tragedy — three lectures on the tragedy of order, of passion, and of isolation; the master test is whether the taxonomy illuminates the actual plays or flattens them, so the meditatio (confronting theory with the experience of the tragedies) carries real weight

capitulos.titulo: My Father as He Slept Tragedy of Order
The Tailors of the Earth Tragedy of Passion
Little World of Man Tragedy of Isolation
